title: Vivi Faces Her Choice
description: On pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part focuses on vivi’s choice approaches. The Straw Hats make plans to depart while Vivi faces the decision of whether to remain a princess or continue sailing with her friends.
scene: This scene belongs to the Vivi’s Choice Approaches sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Zoro, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: My crew won't stop fighting either!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The Hazier such dreams will become!

summary: The Straw Hats make plans to depart while Vivi faces the decision of whether to remain a princess or continue sailing with her friends.
